macro.title: Not all housing demand growth reflects market strength
macro.what: HousingWire data shows how absorption rates, inventory and price cuts reveal the difference between housing recovery and market strength.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Why purchase applications are rising even as mortgage rates climb
macro.what: Purchase apps rose 17% year over year as better spreads kept the 2026 rate curve lower than 2023 to 2025 despite recent increases.

macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
